dialog: HERE I AM! Sorry for the delay — I was running.
Wow! You're so fast! Who are you?
My name is Lady Rate and I'll teach you the MOST IMPORTANT thing in training: the Learning Rate.
It's how 'fast' you try to learn at each step. Seems like a small thing. It's not.
So... learning fast is bad? But Doc Epoch said more epochs are good!
Look at that line. See how it jumps back and forth without ever stopping? That's your fault — your Learning Rate is too high!
You're trying to learn EVERYTHING at ONCE and so you learn NOTHING. It's like trying to read a book flipping pages at 200 km/h.
Oh no! My line is shaking! What do I do?
